description: Scott Hague presents the Fluxbeam keynote, discussing the past year's developments and the launch of Fluxbeam Infinity, a new token trading interface designed to enhance trading experiences on Solana.
topic_summary: In this keynote, Scott Hague outlines Fluxbeam's journey over the past two years, addressing issues in the Solana ecosystem, introducing Rugcheck for scam monitoring, and unveiling Fluxbeam Infinity, which integrates real-time data and advanced trading features for improved user experience [t=134.3].
